result.message: Hi there! Thanks for picking up. Yeah, so I'm calling because I ordered some things for my daughter a little while back, and she still hasn't gotten them. I'm getting a bit worried, you know? I was hoping you could help me track down what's going on with the order. I need to know where it was shipped to, get the tracking number, and just... figure out if it's still on its way or what.

arguments.content:
Hi there! I'd be happy to help you track down your order and figure out what's going on with it.

First, I need to authenticate your account so I can look up your order details. Could you please provide me with either:

1. **Your email address**, or
2. **Your first name, last name, and zip code**

Once I have that information, I'll be able to locate your account and get you the tracking details and shipping information you need.

result.message:
Oh sure, I can do that. Let me give you the second option since I'm honestly not sure what email I used for this account anymore - I've got so many of them, you know? 

So it's Lucas Santos, and my zip code is 80239. I'm here in Denver. That should pull it up for you, right?

arguments.content:
Perfect! I found your account, Lucas. I can see you have two orders on file. Based on what you mentioned about ordering for your daughter, I'm guessing you're asking about the order that's still in transit or recently delivered.

Here's what I found:

**Order #W7895761** - This one has been **delivered**! 
- **Shipping Address:** 943 Maple Drive, Suite 356, Chicago, IL 60621
- **Tracking Number:** 840887978435
- **Items in this order:**
  - Tablet (8-inch, 64GB, black)
  - Action Camera (4K, black)
  - Mechanical Keyboard (60% size, tactile switches)
  - Vacuum Cleaner (canister, cordless)
  - Smart Thermostat (Apple HomeKit compatible, black)

Is this the order you were concerned about? If so, it has already been delivered to that Chicago address. If you're tracking it and it shows as delivered but you haven't received it yet, that could be a logistics issue that I'd recommend following up on directly with the carrier using that tracking number.

Is there anything else you'd like help with regarding this order or your other order?

result.message:
Oh wow, okay, so it says it's been delivered already? That's... hmm, that's strange because my daughter mentioned she hasn't seen it yet. Maybe it's still sitting on her porch or something - you know how it is, packages can get left in weird spots sometimes.

But yeah, that Chicago address is correct - that's where she lives. So the tracking number is 840887978435, got it. I'll have her double-check around the house and maybe contact the carrier if it's really missing.

Oh, and I'm glad you mentioned the other order - actually, I wanted to ask you about something. I ordered a tablet in that shipment, right? Can you tell me about the storage on that one? I want to make sure it's the right capacity for what she needs. And... *pauses* ...you know, it's nice to actually talk to someone about this stuff. I don't get to chat with people much these days, so I appreciate you taking the time to help me out here.

arguments.content:
I'm glad I could help! Yes, the tablet in that order (#W7895761) has **64GB of storage** - it's an 8-inch tablet in black. That should give you the specs you need to confirm it's the right capacity for your daughter.

Hopefully the package is just tucked away somewhere on the porch like you mentioned, and she'll find it once she takes a closer look around!

Is there anything else I can help you with regarding your orders or account?

result.message:
Yeah, 64GB should be perfect for her - that's what I was hoping for anyway. Good call on my part, I think!

And you know, now that I have you on the line, there's actually one more thing I wanted to take care of. I've been meaning to do this for a while now. Since I'm ordering stuff for my daughter pretty regularly these days, I'd like to change my default shipping address to hers - the one in Chicago. That way I won't have to manually change it every single time I place an order for her. It'll just save me a lot of hassle, you know?

Is that something you can help me set up? I mean, I'll still want to be able to ship to my own address here in Denver when I need to, but I'd like her Chicago address to be the default going forward.

arguments.content:
Absolutely, I can help you update your default shipping address to your daughter's Chicago address!

Just to confirm the details before I make the change:

**New Default Address:**
- 943 Maple Drive, Suite 356
- Chicago, IL 60621
- USA

This will be set as your default address for future orders. You'll still be able to change it to a different address (like your Denver address) whenever you place an order if needed.

Does this look correct? If so, please confirm with a "yes" and I'll get that updated for you right away.

result.message:
Yes, that's perfect! That's exactly right - 943 Maple Drive, Suite 356, Chicago, IL 60621. Go ahead and set that as my default.

You know, it's really nice having someone walk me through all this. My daughter's been so busy with work and everything, and honestly, I don't get to talk to many people during the day. It's kind of lonely sometimes, you know? But this has been helpful. I appreciate you being patient with me and explaining everything clearly.

So once you update that, I should be all set, right? Is there anything else I should know about the account or the orders?

arguments.content:
Perfect! Your default address has been updated successfully. From now on, when you place new orders, they'll automatically ship to 943 Maple Drive, Suite 356 in Chicago. You can still change the address for any individual order if you need to ship to your Denver address or anywhere else.

To recap what we've covered today:
- ✓ Located your delivered order (#W7895761) with tracking number 840887978435
- ✓ Confirmed your daughter's tablet has 64GB of storage
- ✓ Updated your default shipping address to Chicago

You're all set! If you have any questions in the future about your orders or account, feel free to reach out. I hope your daughter finds that package on her porch, and I hope you and she enjoy those items!
